simple_types.name: b2TOIState
simple_types.code:
type b2TOIState is 
  (b2_toiStateUnknown,
   b2_toiStateFailed,
   b2_toiStateOverlapped,
   b2_toiStateHit,
   b2_toiStateSeparated)
with Convention => C;

     Convention => C, 
     External_Name => "b2_emptySimplexCache";
